description_long: This object consists of four hot-air balloons, each with a distinctively colored and patterned envelope, floating in a loose vertical and diagonal arrangement. The largest balloon features a deep blue envelope with a tan band near the base, while another balloon displays a segmented pattern of green, white, and red. A third balloon is heart-shaped and solid red, standing out from the more traditional round forms. The fourth balloon is smaller, with a patchwork of blue, yellow, and white. Each balloon is equipped with a small, rectangular basket suspended beneath the envelope, and the suspension cables are visible. The surface of the envelopes appears to be made of tightly woven fabric, with a matte finish and minimal gloss. No visible registration markings or logos are present on any of the balloons.
description: A group of four colorful hot-air balloons, each with unique patterns and visible baskets, float together. The set includes a heart-shaped red balloon and three round balloons with various color schemes.
description_view_0: Four hot-air balloons are visible, with the heart-shaped red balloon and the blue-tan balloon most prominent; all baskets are visible.
description_view_1: The blue-tan balloon is at the top, with the heart-shaped and green-white-red balloons closer together; the blue-yellow balloon is at the bottom.
description_view_2: The heart-shaped red balloon is on the right, the green-white-red balloon is central, and the blue-yellow balloon is lower left; all baskets are visible.
description_view_3: The heart-shaped red balloon is most prominent, with the green-white-red and blue-yellow balloons in the foreground; the blue-tan balloon is at the top.
attribute_envelope_pattern: The balloons display a mix of solid and segmented patterns: one is solid red and heart-shaped, another is deep blue with a tan band, one has green, white, and red segments, and the last features a patchwork of blue, yellow, and white. No logos or symbols are visible.
